title: The Indian Tolls Act, 1864
full_text: The Indian Tolls Act, 1864 भारतीय पथकर अधिनियम,1864 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 186415 Act Number: 15 Enactment Date: 1864-03-24 Act Year: 1864 Short Title: The Indian Tolls Act, 1864 Hindi Title: भारतीय पथकर अधिनियम,1864 Long Title: An Act to amend Act 8 of 1851 (for enabling Government to levy Tolls on Public Roads and Bridges). Ministry: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways Enforcement Date: 24-03-1864 Last Updated: 25-03-2019 Schedule 1. SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Tolls Act, 1864 Show all section Section 1. [Omitted.]. Section 2. Collectors of tolls may compound for tolls leviable under Act 8 of 1851 or this Act. Section 3. Power to extend Act. Section 4. [Repealed.]. Schedule 1. SCHEDULE.
